scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @atimar/app exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter @atimar/dev-dashboard exec tsc --noEmit
scripts.app:build:android: pnpm --filter @atimar/app exec eas build --platform android --profile preview
scripts.app:build:ios: pnpm --filter @atimar/app exec eas build --platform ios --profile preview
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules apps/app/node_modules apps/app/.expo apps/app/.next apps/app/dist apps/dev-dashboard/node_modules apps/dev-dashboard/.next
